title: TabCreateParams
description: Params for `tool.tab_create`. The new tab is always created inside the requesting session's Agent Window (design §6 sandbox rule — agents never spawn tabs in user windows).

active.description: Focus the new tab? Defaults to `true` (matches `chrome.tabs.create`).

index.description: Insertion index within the Agent Window's tab strip. Omit to append at the end.

url.description: Destination URL. Defaults to `chrome://newtab` when omitted.
